utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check full specification per item: 
- destination: provided (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: provided (July 1-5, 2024) – dates specified.
- transportation: requires flight details with costs. Provided: round-trip flights for 4, budget airline, economy class, cost €400. Lacks specific flight numbers/times but the format only says 'flight details with costs'; this includes class, type, and passenger count, so acceptable.
- accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs. Provided: 4-night stay at Family Haven Hotel with €700 cost – acceptable though address not required.
- activities: selected activities with costs. Provided three activities each with costs – acceptable.
- additional_services: any extra services with costs. Provided as N/A – acceptable.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Only a single total €1,420 is given; no itemized breakdown presented. However, individual costs are listed above (transportation €400, accommodation €700, activities €80+€80+€160=€320). The total matches €1,420, and items have costs; though not presented as a breakdown section, the combination constitutes a complete breakdown across categories. Therefore, considered fully specified.
Conclusion: 7/7 items covered.
